title: Augmenting Auditor Judgment in High-Stakes Financial Compliance
conference: Designed and deployed a hybrid AI system (classification model + LLM pipeline) for financial audit decision support. Collaborated with legal auditors to align model outputs with expert judgment.

title: Supporting Professional Reflection through Critical AI Feedback
conference: Led the end-to-end design and implementation of a Google Slides add-on. Conducted a probe study with 13 PMs.

title: Aligning AI Agent Outputs with User Intent via Metacognitive Self-Adaptation
conference: Led the problem formulation, design, implementation, and evaluation of a metacognitive architecture integrating symbolic knowledge and LLMs. Deployed the architecture in a Knowledge-Based AI course with 500+ students. Validated robustness on a controlled synthetic dataset derived from deployment logs.

title: VAL: Interactive Task Planning Interface
conference: Engineered an interactive planning interface for a neural-symbolic agent. Designed human-in-the-loop planning mechanisms to support transparent oversight.

title: Sound Clouds: Participatory Music Generation
conference: Fine-tuned YOLOv12n on a custom dataset and integrated the model into a GoPro-based system, achieving mAP@0.5 = 0.983. Led data collection, analysis, and visualization (N=35) to study user interaction patterns.

title: Calibrating User Trust and Mitigating Overreliance Under LLM Inconsistency
conference: Designed a controlled online experiment (N=252). Led statistical analysis (regression modeling, hypothesis testing in Python/R). Engineered a backend experimental infrastructure (Flask, SQLite).

title: Explainable Churn Prediction to Support Operational Decision-Making
conference: Developed an interpretable churn prediction model (XGBoost + SHAP) to support retention strategy and operational decision-making across business and service teams.

title: Real-Time Background Segmentation
conference: Architected and developed a real-time background segmentation model (PyTorch) using a lightweight backbone and dense connections. Enabled robust training on entirely unlabeled datasets by engineering a knowledge-distillation pipeline with a consistency loss. Deployed the optimized model via ONNX.

title: LTE Network KPI Analysis
conference: Analyzed LTE eNB KPI data using PCA and Python to assess relationships among performance indicators.

title: FORECST: Online Hackathon Platform
conference: Led full-stack development (React.js, Firebase) of an online platform hosting virtual hackathons.

title: MYFIT: Clothing Size Recommendation App
conference: Built an end-to-end Android app in 1 week (team of 3) for clothing size visualization and recommendations.

title: PINTOS: Operating System Implementation
conference: Implemented kernel threads, user programs, file system, and virtual memory in C on QEMU.
